body.title: Installer: repo root on PATH + all device launchers present
body.result: sudo_relay + thelibrarian launchers at root; uu bootstrap --path writes PATH idempotently. commit 26232234.
body.description:
The factory-of-factories install experience requires that every device launcher works by name from any terminal after install. Non-technical users (directed by Vetinari) must be able to run 'sudo_relay', 'granny', 'dsimnel', 'thelibrarian', 'uu' without knowing where the repo lives. This ticket wires that up.

Three parts:
1. **Repo root on PATH**: installer writes `export PATH="$PATH:/path/to/UnseenUniversity"` to `~/.bashrc` (and `~/.zshrc` if present). Idempotent — checks before writing. Absolute path resolved at install time.
2. **Missing root launchers**: add thin launcher scripts at repo root for any device that doesn't have one yet — at minimum: `sudo_relay` (user-facing endpoint for the sudoer relay protocol, wraps `devices/igor/tools/sudo_relay.py`), `thelibrarian` (wraps Librarian shim). `dsimnel` is covered by T-dsimnel-launcher. `granny`, `uu`, `igor` already exist.
3. **sudo_relay tmux design (future hook)**: the `sudo_relay` launcher at root is a thin script today. Future: it will open its own named tmux window (`sudo-relay`) running the sudoer daemon so Vetinari can direct users to that window for credential entry and they can watch output. Add a `# TODO: tmux window` comment in the script as a placeholder for T-sudo-relay-tmux-window.

All root launchers follow the existing pattern (see `granny`, `uu` at repo root) — Python shebang, activate venv if present, exec the device entry point.

**Affected files:** devices/installer/factory.py or installer shim (add PATH write step), repo root (new: sudo_relay, thelibrarian scripts), devices/installer/manifest.json (if launchers need to be in manifest)
**Design rules:** none apply (shell scripts + installer config, no DB touches)
**Scope boundary:** IN: PATH write in installer, sudo_relay root launcher, thelibrarian root launcher, tmux comment placeholder. OUT: actual tmux window launch (T-sudo-relay-tmux-window), dsimnel launcher (T-dsimnel-launcher), Windows PATH (separate concern), moving sudoer_daemon.sh to a more visible location.
**Completion criteria:** after running installer on a clean shell, `which granny`, `which sudo_relay`, `which thelibrarian`, `which dsimnel` (post T-dsimnel-launcher) all resolve; installer PATH write is idempotent (running twice doesn't duplicate the line); sudo_relay script at root runs without error when relay dir exists
